_meta.note: Curated Undertale item lore in our OWN words (paraphrased, not copied). FREE-bucket world knowledge. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW.
_meta.wall: Describes what items are in the world; never what THIS player is carrying (that would be save state).

docs.title: Butterscotch-Cinnamon Pie
docs.text: A warm slice of butterscotch-cinnamon pie, the kind Toriel bakes in the Ruins. It is a comforting healing food and carries the memory of her care.

docs.title: Monster Candy
docs.text: A licorice-flavored sweet found in a bowl in the Ruins, with a note asking to take only one. A modest healing item and an early test of restraint.

docs.title: Cinnamon Bunny
docs.text: A bunny-shaped cinnamon pastry sold in the Snowdin shop — a cozy healing snack from the snowed-in town.

docs.title: Toy Knife
docs.text: A small plastic toy knife found early in the Ruins. A weak weapon — barely more than a child's plaything — and an early choice about what to pick up and why.

docs.title: Stick
docs.text: An ordinary stick from the very start of the journey. The gentlest 'weapon' there is, useful mostly for getting a dog's attention.

docs.title: Faded Ribbon
docs.text: A worn pink ribbon found in the Ruins, worn as light armor. Being a little cuter can make some encounters go easier.

docs.title: Bandage
docs.text: A used bandage carried from the very beginning, worn as the most basic armor and offering a small heal when removed.
